case_title: OMAR I. RAMIREZ VS. LOTUS CONSORTIUM INC. DBA SUDACHI SUSHI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, OMAR I. AS TO DEFENDANT LOTUS CONSORTIUM INC. DBA SUDACHI SUSHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
